notes.body: Upload deposit receipts to the portal ASAP. 2065 owes the 06/17 receipt (1704 owes 06/15-06/17; 2079 owes 06/10-06/11).
Rusul Kadhim is processed and good to schedule. Added to the directory, phone still pending. Active count now 29.
Daymon Roew Jr did not pass the background check — not moving forward. Removed from the directory.
Hub tickets for maintenance — going forward, any time we call out an outsourced company for plumbing, electrical, or any other items, we still submit a hub ticket for tracking and warranty purposes.

June budget at bottom of the 2065 sheet (DoorDash + UberEats promos baked in) — name the daily target at huddle. Large Soda now 30c more than Regular (not 10c). Blackberry counter sign posted. Orientation Checklist with all new hires.
